Also, I really appreciate your insights today; they’ve given me a lot to think about. Do you have any upcoming seminars or talks I should know about?"
Giorgio Rossi: "I actually have a couple of upcoming seminars lined up! One on mathematical modeling in ecological systems next week, and another focusing on the application of geometry in art the week after. I can let you know the details if you're interested! Would you like to come along to any of them, or is there something specific you're curious about?"
Carlos Gomez: "Those seminars sound really interesting, Giorgio! I'd love to hear more details about the one on geometry in art. It seems like it could tie in nicely with my poetry themes. What date is it scheduled for?"
